name: Pasta Alla Carbonara
recipeIngredient: 1 Recipe Egg Pasta (or 3/4 Lb dry fettuccine)
recipeInstructions:
Make the Egg pasta dough; roll as thin as possible and cut into 1/8- to 1/4-inch wide strips. Cut the bacon into thin strips widthwise. Chop the onion. Grate the Parmesan cheese.
COOKING AND SERVING:
Cook the bacon in a frying pan over medium heat until golden brown, about 10 minutes. Remove the bacon and drain on paper towels. Reduce heat to low and cook the onion in bacon fat until soft, about 5 minutes. Remove the pan from heat and set aside. Beat the eggs together in a small bowl. Cook the pasta in a large pot of boiling, salted water until tender, about 3 minutes for fresh pasta. Drain the pasta and return it to the pot. Over low heat, toss the pasta with the bacon, onion, eggs, and Parmesan cheese until the pasta is well coated; heat until the pasta is warmed through. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Serve immediately.
